title: Replace browsing functionality with 'Browse All Products' link bar

requirements.text: Remove the search and category filtering functionality from ProductCatalogSection component
acceptanceCriteria: Search input field is removed from ProductCatalogSection
Category filter buttons are removed from ProductCatalogSection
Products are displayed in the grid without any filtering controls

requirements.text: Add a horizontal bar under the products grid in ProductCatalogSection that displays 'Browse All Products' text with a link to the catalog

quotes: just add a bar like the one last time under products saying "browse all products" and leave it like that because the linnk to the catalog will be kept there

acceptanceCriteria: A horizontal bar component is rendered below the products grid
The bar displays the text 'Browse All Products'
The bar includes a clickable link that preserves the catalog URL/navigation
The bar styling matches the design pattern used previously in the application

constraints: Do not modify backend logic or data models
Preserve the existing product grid display functionality
Keep the catalog link/URL structure intact
